variables.secretsEnvFrom: [reduce(items(variables('resourceConnections')), createArray(), lambda('acc', 'conn', if(and(variables('isSecretsResource')[lambdaVariables('conn').key], not(equals(tryGet(variables('connectionDefinitions')[lambdaVariables('conn').key], 'disableDefaultEnvVars'), true()))), concat(lambdaVariables('acc'), createArray(createObject('prefix', toUpper(format('CONNECTION_{0}_', lambdaVariables('conn').key)), 'secretRef', createObject('name', last(split(string(variables('connectionDefinitions')[lambdaVariables('conn').key].source), '/')))))), lambdaVariables('acc'))))]
variables.connectionEnvVars: [reduce(items(variables('resourceConnections')), createArray(), lambda('acc', 'conn', if(and(not(variables('isSecretsResource')[lambdaVariables('conn').key]), not(equals(tryGet(variables('connectionDefinitions')[lambdaVariables('conn').key], 'disableDefaultEnvVars'), true()))), concat(lambdaVariables('acc'), reduce(items(coalesce(lambdaVariables('conn').value, createObject())), createArray(), lambda('envAcc', 'prop', if(contains(variables('excludedProperties'), lambdaVariables('prop').key), lambdaVariables('envAcc'), concat(lambdaVariables('envAcc'), createArray(createObject('name', toUpper(format('CONNECTION_{0}_{1}', lambdaVariables('conn').key, lambdaVariables('prop').key)), 'value', string(lambdaVariables('prop').value)))))))), lambdaVariables('acc'))))]
variables.aciVolumes: [reduce(variables('volumeItems'), createArray(), lambda('acc', 'vol', concat(lambdaVariables('acc'), createArray(union(createObject('name', lambdaVariables('vol').key), if(and(contains(lambdaVariables('vol').value, 'persistentVolume'), contains(variables('resolvedConnections'), lambdaVariables('vol').key)), createObject('azureFile', createObject('shareName', string(coalesce(tryGet(tryGet(variables('resolvedConnections')[lambdaVariables('vol').key], 'status'), 'computedValues', 'shareName'), '')), 'storageAccountName', string(coalesce(tryGet(tryGet(variables('resolvedConnections')[lambdaVariables('vol').key], 'status'), 'computedValues', 'storageAccountName'), '')), 'storageAccountKey', string(coalesce(tryGet(tryGet(tryGet(variables('resolvedConnections')[lambdaVariables('vol').key], 'status'), 'secrets'), 'storageAccountKey', 'Value'), '')), 'readOnly', equals(string(coalesce(tryGet(lambdaVariables('vol').value.persistentVolume, 'accessMode'), '')), 'ReadOnlyMany'))), createObject()), if(contains(lambdaVariables('vol').value, 'emptyDir'), createObject('emptyDir', createObject()), createObject()))))))]
variables.aciVolumeMounts: [reduce(variables('rawVolumeMounts'), createArray(), lambda('acc', 'vm', concat(lambdaVariables('acc'), createArray(union(createObject('name', lambdaVariables('vm').volumeName, 'mountPath', lambdaVariables('vm').mountPath), if(equals(coalesce(tryGet(lambdaVariables('vm'), 'readOnly'), false()), true()), createObject('readOnly', true()), createObject()))))))]

properties.description: Allow Internet traffic on port range
